code: export class HeightMapUpdateParser{constructor(){this._width=0;this._height=0;this._cells=[];}flush(){this._width=0;this._height=0;this._cells=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;this._width=wrapper.readInt();this._height=wrapper.readInt();this._cells=[];while(wrapper.bytesAvailable){const x=wrapper.readShort();const y=wrapper.readShort();const z=wrapper.readByte();const state=wrapper.readByte();this._cells.push({x,y,z,state});}return true;}get width(){return this._width;}get height(){return this._height;}get cells(){return this._cells;}}
